<answer>```cpp
// eas_common.hpp
#pragma once

#include <filesystem>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <rfl/json.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>

using namespace sqlgen::literals;

struct Student {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<sqlgen::Varchar<10>> SNo;
  sqlgen::Varchar<30> SName;
  int Sex = 1;
  std::optional<sqlgen::DateTime> Birthday;
  std::optional<uint32_t> Major;
  std::optional<int> Age;  // Added Age field as int, optional (allowing nulls)
  std::optional<double> Scorses = 0.0;
  std::optional<std::string> Remark;
};

struct Course {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<uint32_t, sqlgen::auto_incr> CID;
  sqlgen::Varchar<50> CName;
  std::optional<int> Term = 1;
  std::optional<int> CTime;
  int Credit = 0;
};

struct Score {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<uint32_t, sqlgen::auto_incr> ScID;
  sqlgen::ForeignKey<sqlgen::Varchar<10>, Student, "SNo"> SNo;
  sqlgen::ForeignKey<uint32_t, Course, "CID"> CID;
  std::optional<double> Score;
  char Grade;  // Added Grade field as char(1), not optional (not null)
};

struct Major {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<uint32_t> MID;
  sqlgen::Varchar<30> MName;
};

const std::string db_path = "data/eas_database.db";

void design_eas_database_without_major() {
  std::filesystem::create_directories("data");
  sqlgen::sqlite::connect(db_path)
      .and_then([](auto&& conn) {
        return sqlgen::exec(conn, "PRAGMA foreign_keys = ON;");
      })
      .and_then(sqlgen::create_table<Student> | sqlgen::if_not_exists)
      .and_then(sqlgen::create_table<Course> | sqlgen::if_not_exists)
      .and_then(sqlgen::create_table<Score> | sqlgen::if_not_exists)
      .value();
}

void design_eas_database_with_major() {
  design_eas_database_without_major();

  sqlgen::sqlite::connect(db_path)
      .and_then(sqlgen::create_table<Major> | sqlgen::if_not_exists)
      .value();
}

// update_eas_table.hpp
#pragma once

#include <filesystem>
#include <rfl.hpp>
#include <rfl/json.hpp>
#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
#include <string>

#include "eas_common.hpp"

namespace update_eas_table {

void update_eas_table() {
  design_eas_database_with_major();
  
  // Connect to the database
  auto conn_result = sqlgen::sqlite::connect(db_path);
  if (!conn_result) {
    // Handle connection error
    return;
  }
  auto conn = conn_result.value();

  // 1. Add Grade column to Score table
  conn.and_then([](auto&& conn) {
    return sqlgen::exec(conn, "ALTER TABLE Score ADD COLUMN Grade CHAR(1) NOT NULL;");
  }).value();

  // 2. Modify Age column in Student table to int (already reflected in struct)
  // The struct modification ensures the type change during table creation
  // No additional SQL needed for type change as it's handled by struct definition

  // 3. Drop Major table
  conn.and_then(sqlgen::drop<Major> | sqlgen::if_exists).value();
}

} // namespace update_eas_table
```</answer>

// Custom ltrim and rtrim
std::string ltrim(const std::string& str, const std::string& chars = " ") {
    auto start = str.begin();
    while (start != str.end() && std::none_of(_chars.begin(), _chars.end(), [&](char c) { return *start == c; })) {
        ++start;
    }
    return std::string(start, str.end());
}

std::string rtrim(const std::string& str, const std::string& chars = " ") {
    auto end = str.end();
    --end;
    while (end != str.begin() && std::none_of(_chars.begin(), _chars.end(), [&](char c) { return *end == c; })) {
        --end;
    }
    return std::string(str.begin(), end + 1);
}
```

 Code:

   #include <sqlgen.hpp>
   #include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
   #include <vector>
   #include <optional>

   namespace calculate_order_metrics {

   struct OrderItem {
     sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> item_id;
     int order_id;
     int product_id;
     double unit_price;
     int quantity;
     std::optional<double> discount_rate;
     std::optional<double> tax_rate;
   };

   struct OrderMetrics {
     int item_id;
     int order_id;
     int product_id;
     double unit_price;
     int quantity;
     double discount_rate;
     double tax_rate;
     double gross_total;
     double discounted_total;
     double final_total;
     double unit_cost;
     int quantity_group;
     double estimated_profit;
   };

   std::vector<OrderMetrics> calculate_order_metrics_impl(const std::vector<OrderItem>& items) {
     using namespace sqlgen::literals;

     // Connect to the database
     auto conn_result = sqlgen::sqlite::connect();
     if (!conn_result.is_ok()) {
         throw std::runtime_error(conn_result.error().what());
     }
     auto conn = conn_result.value();

     // Create the table
     auto create_table_result = conn->execute(R"(
         CREATE TABLE OrderItem (
             item_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
             order_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
             product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
             unit_price REAL NOT NULL,
             quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,
             discount_rate REAL,
             tax_rate REAL
         )
     )");
     if (!create_table_result.is_ok()) {
         throw std::runtime_error(create_table_result.error().what());
     }

     // Insert the data
     auto write_result = write(items)(conn);
     if (!write_result.is_ok()) {
         throw std::runtime_error(write_result.error().what());
     }

     // Build the query
     auto query = select_from<OrderItem>(
         "item_id"_c,
         "order_id"_c,
         "product_id"_c,
         "unit_price"_c,
         "quantity"_c,
         "discount_rate"_c,
         "tax_rate"_c,
         ("unit_price"_c * "quantity"_c).as<"gross_total">(),
         (("unit_price"_c * "quantity"_c) * (1 - ("discount_rate"_c / 100.0))).as<"discounted_total">(),
         (("unit_price"_c * "quantity"_c) * (1 - ("discount_rate"_c / 100.0)) * (1 + ("tax_rate"_c / 100.0))).as<"final_total">(),
         (("unit_price"_c * "quantity"_c) / "quantity"_c).as<"unit_cost">(),
         ("quantity"_c % 10).as<"quantity_group">(),
         ("unit_price"_c * 0.3).as<"estimated_profit">()
     ) | to<std::vector<OrderMetrics>>;

     // Execute the query
     auto result = query(conn);
     if (!result.is_ok()) {
         throw std::runtime_error(result.error().what());
     }

     return result.value();
   }

   }  // namespace calculate_order_metrics

   #include <sqlgen.hpp>
   #include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>
   #include <vector>
   #include <optional>

   namespace calculate_order_metrics {

   struct OrderItem {
     sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> item_id;
     int order_id;
     int product_id;
     double unit_price;
     int quantity;
     std::optional<double> discount_rate;
     std::optional<double> tax_rate;
   };

   struct OrderMetrics {
     int item_id;
     int order_id;
     int product_id;
     double unit_price;
     int quantity;
     double discount_rate;
     double tax_rate;
     double gross_total;
     double discounted_total;
     double final_total;
     double unit_cost;
     int quantity_group;
     double estimated_profit;
   };

   std::vector<OrderMetrics> calculate_order_metrics_impl(const std::vector<OrderItem>& items) {
     using namespace sqlgen::literals;
     using sqlgen::to;

     // Connect to the database
     auto conn_result = sqlgen::sqlite::connect();
     if (!conn_result.is_ok()) {
         throw std::runtime_error(conn_result.error().what());
     }
     auto conn = conn_result.value();

     // Create the table
     auto create_table_result = conn->execute(R"(
         CREATE TABLE OrderItem (
             item_id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY,
             order_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
             product_id INTEGER NOT NULL,
             unit_price REAL NOT NULL,
             quantity INTEGER NOT NULL,
             discount_rate REAL,
             tax_rate REAL
         )
     )");
     if (!create_table_result.is_ok()) {
         throw std::runtime_error(create_table_result.error().what());
     }

     // Insert the data
     auto write_result = sqlgen::write(items)(conn);
     if (!write_result.is_ok()) {
         throw std::runtime_error(write_result.error().what());
     }

     // Build the query
     auto query = sqlgen::select_from<OrderItem>(
         "item_id"_c,
         "order_id"_c,
         "product_id"_c,
         "unit_price"_c,
         "quantity"_c,
         "discount_rate"_c,
         "tax_rate"_c,
         ("unit_price"_c * "quantity"_c).as<"gross_total">(),
         (("unit_price"_c * "quantity"_c) * (1 - ("discount_rate"_c / 100.0))).as<"discounted_total">(),
         (("unit_price"_c * "quantity"_c) * (1 - ("discount_rate"_c / 100.0)) * (1 + ("tax_rate"_c / 100.0))).as<"final_total">(),
         (("unit_price"_c * "quantity"_c) / "quantity"_c).as<"unit_cost">(),
         ("quantity"_c % 10).as<"quantity_group">(),
         ("unit_price"_c * 0.3).as<"estimated_profit">()
     ) | to<std::vector<OrderMetrics>>;

     // Execute the query
     auto result = query(conn);
     if (!result.is_ok()) {
         throw std::runtime_error(result.error().what());
     }

     return result.value();
   }

   }  // namespace calculate_order_metrics

<answer>```cpp
#pragma once

#include <sqlgen.hpp>
#include <sqlgen/sqlite.hpp>

namespace read_single_record_by_id {

struct Customer {
  sqlgen::PrimaryKey<int> customer_id;
  std::string name;
  std::string email;
};

/**
 * description: read_single_record_by_id.
 * This function demonstrates how to read a single record by id using sqlgen read API.
 * It returns the matched row from the Customer table.
 * Returns: Customer.
 */
Customer read_single_record_by_id(int id) {
    using namespace sqlgen::literals;
    auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect("test_db.sqlite");
    auto read_op = sqlgen::read<Customer> | sqlgen::where("customer_id"_c == id);
    return read_op(conn).value();
}

}  // namespace read_single_record_by_id
```</answer>

   JoinAnalysis analyze_department_employees_impl(const std::vector<Department>& depts, const std::vector<Employee>& emps) {
     JoinAnalysis analysis;

     // Connect to the database
     auto conn = sqlgen::sqlite::connect().value();

     // Create tables if not exists
     (sqlgen::create_table<Department> | sqlgen::if_not_exists)(conn);
     (sqlgen::create_table<Employee> | sqlgen::if_not_exists)(conn);

     // Insert the data
     sqlgen::insert(depts)(conn);
     sqlgen::insert(emps)(conn);

     // Define the condition for the joins
     auto cond = sqlgen::Col<"department_id", "d">{} == sqlgen::Col<"department_id", "e">{};

     // Inner join: Department left outer join Employee
     auto query_inner = sqlgen::select_from<Department, "d">(
         sqlgen::Col<"department_name", "d">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"first_name", "e">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"last_name", "e">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"salary", "e">{}
     ) | sqlgen::inner_join<Employee, "e">(cond) | sqlgen::to<std::vector<JoinResult>>;

     auto results_inner = query_inner(conn);
     if (results_inner.is_ok()) {
         analysis.inner_join_results = results_inner.value();
     }

     // Left join: Employee left outer join Department
     auto query_left = sqlgen::select_from<Employee, "e">(
         sqlgen::Col<"first_name", "e">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"last_name", "e">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"salary", "e">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"department_name", "d">{}
     ) | sqlgen::left_join<Department, "d">(cond) | sqlgen::to<std::vector<JoinResult>>;

     auto results_left = query_left(conn);
     if (results_left.is_ok()) {
         analysis.left_join_results = results_left.value();
     }

     // Right join: Department right outer join Employee
     auto query_right = sqlgen::select_from<Department, "d">(
         sqlgen::Col<"department_name", "d">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"first_name", "e">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"last_name", "e">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"salary", "e">{}
     ) | sqlgen::right_join<Employee, "e">(cond) | sqlgen::to<std::vector<JoinResult>>;

     auto results_right = query_right(conn);
     if (results_right.is_ok()) {
         analysis.right_join_results = results_right.value();
     }

     // Full join: Department full outer join Employee
     auto query_full = sqlgen::select_from<Department, "d">(
         sqlgen::Col<"department_name", "d">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"first_name", "e">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"last_name", "e">{},
         sqlgen::Col<"salary", "e">{}
     ) | sqlgen::full_join<Employee, "e">(cond) | sqlgen::to<std::vector<JoinResult>>;

     auto results_full = query_full(conn);
     if (results_full.is_ok()) {
         analysis.full_join_results = results_full.value();
     }

     return analysis;
   }
